# Piyush Prasad — Cloud & DevOps Engineer

> Portfolio of Piyush Prasad, an aspiring Cloud & DevOps engineer based in Navi Mumbai, India — with hands-on work in AWS, CI/CD, containers, monitoring, and DevSecOps.

Piyush's site is a single-page portfolio covering experience, projects, certifications, education, and a technical guide on secure CI/CD pipelines. Contact: piyush@piyushprasad.in.

## Pages

- [Portfolio](/): Experience, projects, skills, certifications, and education for Piyush Prasad.
- [Resume](/resume): View-only PDF resume.

## Guides

- [Building a Secure CI/CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions and Trivy](/guides/devsecops-pipeline): Practical DevSecOps walkthrough covering Trivy scans, OIDC, SBOMs, container hardening, and secrets management.
